name: Paris
structuralContext: Airparif — reference model. Dense sensor network, real-time, WHO standards, source apportionment studies, public-facing platform.

name: Mexico City
structuralContext: SIMAT network ~35 stations. IMECA standard more lenient than WHO — invalidates benchmark step across all chains. No source apportionment product.

name: Accra
structuralContext: 4–5 reference grade monitors, not real-time (SD card only). 55 low-cost sensors across 13 of 25 city councils. Fragmented governance. No unified portal.
